Step 1a: PM config (SLM_PROF_CLI + SLM_C.output:
show config services performance-monitoring | no-more

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-start [27-Jul-2025 09:16:08 UTC]

services
  performance-monitoring
    cfm
      two-way-delay-measurement DM_CLI_TAB_mep1
        admin-state enabled
        description cli_tab_test
        profile DM_PROF_CLI
        source maintenance-domain MD-CUST maintenance-association MA-CUST mep-id 1
        target mep-id 2
      !
      two-way-synthetic-loss-measurement SLM_CLI_TAB_mep1
        admin-state enabled
        description cli_tab_test_slm
        profile SLM_PROF_CLI
        source maintenance-domain MD-CUST maintenance-association MA-CUST mep-id 1
        target mep-id 2
      !
      two-way-synthetic-loss-measurement SLM_CLI_TAB_mep3
        admin-state enabled
        description cli_tab_test_slm
        profile SLM_PROF_CLI
        source maintenance-domain MD-CUST1 maintenance-association MA-CUST1 mep-id 3
        target mac-address 84:40:76:90:cd:15
      !
    !
    profiles
      cfm
        two-way-delay-measurement DM_PROF_CLI
          inform-test-results enabled
          test-duration probes probe-count 5 probe-interval 1 repeat-interval 10
          thresholds
            delay-rtt-avg 1000
            delay-rtt-max 2000
            delay-rtt-min 100
            jitter-rtt-avg 500
            jitter-rtt-max 1000
            success-rate 90.0
          !
        !
        two-way-delay-measurement DM_PROF_CLI2
          thresholds
            delay-rtt-avg 1
            success-rate 40.0
          !
        !
        two-way-synthetic-loss-measurement SLM_PROF_CLI
          inform-test-results enabled
          pcp 5
          test-duration probes probe-count 5 probe-interval 1 repeat-interval 10
          thresholds
            far-end-loss 1.0
            near-end-loss 1.0
          !
        !
      !
    !
  !
!

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-end

ncpl-cfm-nog#
